message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Polizei in einer Großstadt (Köln 1973)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0530","justification":"Survey of police officers in a large German city (Cologne) in 1973 about work, attitudes, and law-enforcement issues. Fits crime/law enforcement theme in Germany during the 1970s."},{"title":"Kriminalitätsfurcht, soziale Desintegration und Kriminalitätserfahrungen 1975","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0126","justification":"German population survey from 1975 on fear of crime, victimization, and related attitudes. Directly addresses crime in Germany in the 1970s."},{"title":"Einstellungen der Bevölkerung zum Rechtssystem 1978","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0172","justification":"Survey on attitudes of the German population towards the legal and justice system in 1978, including courts, police, and law enforcement."},{"title":"Rechtseinstellungen und Rechtsbewusstsein 1976","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0148","justification":"Study of legal consciousness and attitudes toward law in the Federal Republic of Germany in 1976; covers perceptions of legal institutions and enforcement."},{"title":"Polizei- und Kriminalitätsbild der Bevölkerung 1974","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0111","justification":"German public opinion survey on the image of the police and crime in 1974, focused on crime, policing, and law enforcement in Germany."},{"title":"Rechtssoziologische Umfrage zur Strafrechtspflege 1972","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0079","justification":"Socio-legal survey on criminal justice in the Federal Republic of Germany in 1972, including views on criminal courts, sentencing, and enforcement."},{"title":"Einstellungen zur Inneren Sicherheit in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1977","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0161","justification":"Study on attitudes toward internal security in West Germany in 1977, including crime, terrorism, police powers, and security policy."},{"title":"Kriminalitätswahrnehmung und Sicherheitsgefühl in der Bundesrepublik 1979","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0189","justification":"Survey on how crime is perceived and feelings of safety in the Federal Republic of Germany in 1979; directly linked to crime and policing issues."},{"title":"Jugendliche und Kriminalität 1970","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0043","justification":"Study on German youth and crime in 1970, focusing on delinquency, contacts with police, and attitudes towards legal norms."},{"title":"Strafvollzug in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1975","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0137","justification":"Dataset on prison system and execution of criminal sentences in West Germany in 1975, relevant to criminal justice and law enforcement institutions."}]}
